nodes.label: XtreamProviderTest.kt
XtreamProviderTest
.`parseXtreamExpirationDate handles slash separated local date times`()
.`parseXtreamExpirationDate handles slash separated dates`()
.`parseXtreamExpirationDate handles timestamps and iso instants`()
.`authenticate normalizes allowed output formats`()
.`getLiveStreams preserves live container extension in internal url`()
.`getLiveStreams prefers hls and keeps ts fallback when both output formats are allowed`()
.`mapLiveStreamsResponse keeps sync live rows lightweight`()
.`buildCatchUpUrls includes xtream route and php fallbacks for preferred formats`()
.`getVodInfo keeps names raw while decoding common xtream metadata fields`()
.`getSeriesList keeps plain titles that only accidentally look like base64`()
.`getSeriesList keeps padded base64 looking titles raw`()
.`getSeriesList decodes padded base64 looking titles when compatibility mode is enabled`()
.`getFullEpg still decodes base64 title and description`()
.`getVodStreams still loads when category prefetch fails`()
.`getVodStreams honors explicit adult flag from xtream payload`()
.`getLiveCategories honors explicit adult flag from xtream category payload`()
.`getLiveStreams inherits adult status from xtream category flag`()
.`getLiveStreams uses category_ids when live category_id is missing or zero`()
.`getSeriesCategories honors explicit adult flag from xtream category payload`()
.`vod list and details both normalize ratings to ten point scale`()
.`getSeriesInfo falls back to legacy series query parameter when primary payload is empty`()
.`getSeriesInfo builds usable series from episodes when info block is missing`()

.authenticate()
.getLiveCategories()
.getLiveStreams()
.getVodCategories()
.getVodStreams()
.getVodInfo()
.getSeriesCategories()
.getSeriesList()
.getSeriesInfo()
.getShortEpg()
